description_long: This is a two-story residential house with a dark, hipped roof and a symmetrical facade. The front features a prominent entryway with a covered porch, steps, and a central door flanked by large windows. The exterior walls are finished in a combination of light and dark materials, with brick or stone accents at the corners and around the windows. The rear of the house includes a large, covered patio or veranda, accessible by a set of steps. Windows are arranged in symmetrical rows on the front and rear, while the sides have fewer, more spaced-out windows. The overall design suggests a blend of Colonial and early 20th-century American suburban architectural styles.
description: A two-story house with a dark hipped roof, symmetrical windows, and a covered front porch with steps. The exterior features light and dark materials with brick or stone accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with a covered porch, steps, and symmetrical windows on both floors.
description_view_1: Left side view with minimal windows and visible brick or stone corner accents.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a large covered patio/veranda and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_3: Right side view with a few windows and the extension of the rear patio roof visible.
attribute_entryway_design: Central door with covered porch, steps, and overhanging roof supported by columns
